title: Audit RAK4631 bridge USB CDC build warning
description: During project-LICHEN-2067.1.1.1 no-hardware EC2 validation, rak4631/nrf52840 bridge-zephyr target auto-merged firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/rak4631_nrf52840.conf and built successfully, but Zephyr emitted a compile warning from subsys/usb/device/class/cdc_acm.c: #warning "USB_CDC_ACM_LOG_LEVEL forced to LOG_LEVEL_NONE". Decide whether the RAK4631 bridge auto-merge fragment should keep USB CDC console enabled, set/log the expected CDC logging behavior explicitly, or split LoRa-only build coverage from USB local-client behavior. No hardware required for the build-warning audit; physical USB behavior remains a separate validation concern.
